[https://www.instagram.com/pepsiindia/ Pepsi India] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=1,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-08-20 |edate=2021-08-23 |twitter= |instagram=aplesports_org |web= |facebook= |youtube=c/APLESPORTS |previous=APL_Invitational/Season 1{{!}}APL Invitational:SO1 }} '''''[https://www.instagram.com/aplesports_org/ APL ESPORTS]''''' in collaboration with '''''[https://www.instagram.com/pepsiindia/ Pepsi India]''''' and '''''[https://www.instagram.com/durgeshmishra_01/ Durgesh Mishra]''''' present the second season of '''APL Invitational''' with a prize pool of ₹2,50,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. The first round features a prize pool of ₹1,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi|b1flag=in |b1name=Shubham Chawla |b2=Spero|b2name=Piyush Bathla|b2flag=in |b3=Gamezo Tech|b3flag=in|b3name=Subodh Panwar }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''APL Invitational S02 Round 1: '''20th August - 23rd August, 2021'' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' * ''24 Teams divided into 4 groups '' (A, B, C, and D) * '' 6 Teams in each group'' * ''Teams will compete in a round robin format'' * ''12 Matches to be played over a period of 4 days (Each team to play 9 Matches).'' * ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''Top 18 teams '''}} from the overall standings + ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''1 Fan Favourite team '''}} out of 6 eliminated teams advance to [[APL_Invitational/Season_2/Round_2|Round 2]]''. ====Matchdays==== * ''4 Matchdays: 3 Matches to be played each day .'' ** '''''20th August (Friday)''''': ''3x ABC (E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''21st August (Saturday)''''': ''3x ABD (E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''22nd August (Sunday)''''': ''3x ACD (E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''23rd August (Monday)''''': ''3x BCD (E>>M>>S)'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |-
